text:
{"folios":[{"folio":"93","text":"Vō dem land ze
meysenburg
tünnēt jōhē pēt
dietrich lübsō
peter vō basel sin prīest
Vō lottringen
jōhēs vō gartzunt prēt
oswaldu vō minrunt prīst
cōla vō bayan sin knecht
Vō hōstan lant
jacob wōllang
hans můller
heinrich lang
Vō frōburg
hans vō frōburg sin prīst
paut jōhans dē basel","addition1":"","addition2":"","addition3":""}]}

folios.text:
Vō dem land ze
meysenburg
tünnēt jōhē pēt
dietrich lübsō
peter vō basel sin prīest
Vō lottringen
jōhēs vō gartzunt prēt
oswaldu vō minrunt prīst
cōla vō bayan sin knecht
Vō hōstan lant
jacob wōllang
hans můller
heinrich lang
Vō frōburg
hans vō frōburg sin prīst
paut jōhans dē basel
